title: 客户投资组合的检视 / Reviewing Clients' Portfolios
summary: 识别并满足客户需求的过程不会因初始建议落地而停止——客户的个人情况会变、新需求会浮现,使原有产品不再充分。何时及多久检视一次取决于初始建议与客户意愿,但有四类一般触发因素:个人情况、外部发展、已购产品、产品发展。 / Meeting client needs does not stop at implementation; circumstances change and original recommendations may become inadequate. When and how often to review depends on the initial advice and the client's wishes, but four general triggers apply: personal circumstances, external developments, products purchased, and product developments.

sections.heading: 引言:为何要定期检视
sections.body: 识别并满足客户需求的过程不会因初始建议落地而停止。客户的个人情况很可能改变、新需求会浮现,这会影响最初的产品推荐——它们可能不再充分。定期检视能确保客户持续获得优质服务,并巩固客户与顾问的关系。核心问题是:'客户的状况应在何时、多久检视一次?'这在一定程度上取决于最初提供的建议,当然也取决于客户自身对检视的意愿。

sections.heading: Introduction: why regular reviews
sections.body: The process of identifying and satisfying client needs does not stop with the implementation of the initial recommendations. A client's personal circumstances are likely to change and new needs may surface, which affects the initial product recommendations as they may no longer be adequate. Regular reviews ensure the client continues to receive quality service and reinforce the client-adviser relationship. The key question is 'When and how often should the client's position be reviewed?' — this depends to some extent on the initial advice provided and, of course, on the client's own wishes for a review.

sections.heading: 四类一般触发因素
sections.body: 有一些一般原则帮助判断何时需要检视客户,主要有四类触发因素:(a) 客户的个人情况;(b) 外部发展;(c) 客户已购买的产品;(d) 产品发展。教材随后逐一讨论每一类因素。

sections.heading: The four general triggers
sections.body: Some general principles help decide when client reviews are needed, organised into four triggers: (a) the client's personal circumstances; (b) external developments; (c) products purchased by the client; and (d) product developments. The chapter considers each of these factors in turn.

sections.heading: 个人情况:个人变化与家庭变化
sections.body: 客户个人情况的任何重大变化都可能带来新需求,须加以检视以确保客户得到充分保障。个人变化:如从组屋(HDB)升级到公寓,需检视收支状况与现有产品(如递减式房贷定期保险 mortgage reducing term insurance)是否仍提供足够保障;客户健康恶化可能触发健康保险理赔并促使检视其财务状况与需求。家庭变化:结婚、子女出生或配偶去世会带来新责任与更高的保障需求;父母去世留下遗产时,检视可帮助客户认识如何运用遗产实现目标;离婚是另一项需对财务状况做'完整检视'的重大变化;照顾年迈父母可能使客户或其配偶停止工作,改变夫妻财务状况并影响其实现财务目标的能力。可见,家庭变化往往导致对既有安排的完整检视。

sections.heading: Personal circumstances: personal and family changes
sections.body: Any significant change to a client's personal circumstances likely introduces new needs to be reviewed so clients stay adequately covered. Personal changes: e.g. upgrading from an HDB flat to a condominium requires reviewing income/expenditure and existing products (such as mortgage reducing term insurance) for adequate cover; deterioration in health may give rise to a health-insurance claim and prompt a review of the client's position and needs. Family changes: marriage, the birth of a child or death of a spouse create new responsibilities and greater protection needs; where a parent's death passes an inheritance to the client, the review helps the client appreciate how it can meet objectives; divorce is another significant change calling for a complete review; and caring for an elderly parent may force the client or spouse to stop work, changing the couple's finances and their ability to meet objectives. Family changes often lead to a complete review of existing arrangements.

sections.heading: 个人情况:就业变化、目标与客户请求
sections.body: 就业变化:退休与裁员是需做'全面检视'的重大变化——理想情况下,客户检视应在退休或裁员实际发生'之前'进行,以便做好充分准备实现平稳过渡;换工作可能意味收入改变,升职或获大额花红同理;自雇客户可能需在每个营业年度结束时检视财务状况。目标:客户目标会随时间改变(如决定比原计划提前五年退休),因此其储蓄与投资产品须重新评估,以判断财务状况是否使提前退休成为合理之选。客户请求:有些客户重视定期检视并主动要求;但你应询问客户希望多久检视一次,这有助于与客户保持定期联系。

sections.heading: Personal circumstances: employment, objectives and requests
sections.body: Employment changes: retirement and redundancy are significant changes needing a full review — ideally conducted just BEFORE the event so sufficient preparation can be made for a smooth adjustment; a change in job may signify a change in income, as may promotion or a significant bonus; self-employed clients may find it necessary to review at each business year-end. Objectives: a client's objectives change over time (e.g. deciding to retire five years earlier than planned), so savings and investment products must be reassessed to see whether early retirement is a reasonable proposition. Clients' requests: some clients value regular reviews and specifically request them; however, you should ask how often they wish to review their plans, which helps maintain regular contact.

sections.heading: 外部发展:CPF 规则变动与市场变化
sections.body: 外部发展也可能使检视客户的财务状况与现有产品变得适当。CPF 规则变动:CPF 规则的变化可能影响客户的财务状况和/或已持有产品的适当性——例如雇员或雇主'缴费率'的变化,正是检视客户需求的好时机。市场变化:投资市场的变化,例如股价'大幅下跌',可能意味着需要检视客户的现有投资与储蓄产品,尤其是在你已知客户在股票上有大量投资的情况下;对持有投连保单且其底层基金大量投资于股票的客户同样适用。

sections.heading: External developments: CPF rule changes and market changes
sections.body: External developments may also make it appropriate to review both the client's financial position and existing products. CPF rules change: changes in CPF rules may impact the client's financial position and/or the appropriateness of products already held — for example, a change in employees' or employers' contribution rates is an opportune time to review needs. Market changes: a change in the investment market, such as a steep fall in equity prices, may signal a need to review existing investments and savings products, especially where you know the client has invested substantially in equities; this also applies to a client holding an investment-linked policy whose underlying fund invests substantially in equities.

sections.heading: 已购产品(一):人寿保险与健康保险
sections.body: 决定何时检视客户状况的一个重要因素就是'最初的产品推荐本身'。虽然多数推荐的产品属中长期性质,但仍需定期检视以确保它们继续满足客户的原始需求。人寿保险产品应在以下情况检视:(a) 当产品有可行使的选择权时,例如转换为另一类型产品——转换选择权很重要,通常'无需进一步的健康证明'即可由客户行使;(b) 若人寿产品以信托形式订立,须定期检视信托以确保内容仍然相关(如受益人是否有变);(c) 确保保额足以满足客户所需的财务保障水平——例如通胀或客户情况变化可能使现有人寿保障不再充分。健康保险产品应检视以确保:(a) 产品得以续保,尤其是按年续保者(如医疗费用保险或意外与疾病保险),年度续保是确认客户仍持有最合适产品与供应商的理想机会;(b) 保障水平充足——例如确保失能收入保险与客户生活水准、收入的变化保持同步,通胀或职业快速晋升也可能使保障不足,因此应持续检视与产品相关的选择权(如无需医疗证明即可提高保障的选择权对部分客户很有价值)。

sections.heading: Products purchased (1): life and health insurance
sections.body: An important factor in deciding when to review is the original product recommendation itself. Although most recommended products are medium-to-long term, regular reviews are needed to ensure they continue to meet the client's original needs. Life insurance products should be reviewed: (a) when there are options available, such as to convert to an alternative product — conversion options are important as they can usually be exercised without further evidence of health; (b) if written under trust, to ensure the contents remain relevant (e.g. no change to beneficiaries); and (c) to ensure the sum assured is sufficient — inflation or a change in circumstances may render existing cover no longer sufficient. Health insurance products should be reviewed to ensure: (a) the product is renewed, especially if annually renewable (e.g. medical expenses or accident and sickness insurance) — the annual renewal is an ideal opportunity to confirm the most suitable product and provider; and (b) the level of cover is sufficient — e.g. disability income cover should keep pace with the client's standard of living and income, as inflation or rapid career progression could render it insufficient, so keep related options (e.g. increasing cover without medical evidence) under review.

sections.heading: 已购产品(二):投连产品与产品发展
sections.body: 投连产品(Investment-linked products):应检视以确定是否需要根据寄送给客户的'基金表现报告与保单结单'建议客户转换至另一基金。产品发展:金融服务市场频繁推出新产品,它们提供检视客户现有产品组合的明显机会。例如'长期护理保险产品'的推出,使你有机会就慢性疾病情况下的财务保障向客户建议;提供'资本保证'的投连保单的推出,可能吸引希望锁定高回报率以保护初始投资的客户。总之,检视需求可源于客户个人情况的变化、外部发展和/或产品要求,定期检视对你与客户双方都有益。作为财务顾问代表,你不仅要确保所推荐产品符合客户当前需求,还应主动安排与客户的定期会面以满足其未来需求——客户的长期需求应是首要关切,与客户的关系应是持续的。

sections.heading: Products purchased (2): ILPs and product developments
sections.body: Investment-linked products should be reviewed to determine whether to advise the client to switch to another fund, based on the fund performance report and policy statement sent out to the client. Product developments: new products are introduced frequently and provide obvious opportunities to review a client's existing portfolio — e.g. the introduction of long-term care insurance lets you advise on financial protection against chronic ill health, and the launch of investment-linked policies offering a capital guarantee may interest clients who wish to lock into a high return to protect their initial investment. In summary, the need for a review can arise from changes in personal circumstances, external developments and/or product requirements, and regular reviews benefit both adviser and client. As an FA representative you should not only ensure recommended products meet current needs but also arrange regular meetings to address future needs — the client's long-term needs should be a principal concern and the relationship an ongoing one.

sections.heading: 示例:保单的替换(Replacement of Policies)
sections.body: 若客户被销售了不合适的产品,或保单已超出其原始意图,财务顾问代表是否应主动发起保单替换?这是一个'灰色地带',因为不道德的顾问很容易为替换保单向客户合理化出一个令人信服的理由。因此,良好做法是:所有保单替换的推荐都应经过 FA 代表的'主管确认与同意',以降低不当销售的风险。在正常情况下,应'不鼓励'替换保单。因为人寿保单是一份法律合约,替换保单意味着使现有合约的条款与条件失效并开启一份新合约。新保单将'重置(re-set)'以下条款:(a) 不可争议条款(Incontestability Clause);(b) 等待期(Waiting Period);(c) 自杀条款(Suicide Clause)。同时,被替换的保险将'失去'以下利益:(a) 索赔时点已累积的复归红利(Accumulated reversionary bonus)。

sections.heading: Example: Replacement of Policies
sections.body: If a client was sold an unsuitable product or has outlived the original intent of the policy, should the FA representative initiate a replacement? This is a grey area, because an unethical adviser could easily rationalise a convincing reason for replacement. Good practice is therefore that all replacement-of-policy recommendations be acknowledged and agreed by the FA representative's supervisor, to mitigate the risk of unethical selling. Under normal circumstances, replacement of insurance policies should be discouraged, because a life policy is a legal contract and replacing it voids the existing contract's terms and starts a new one. The following conditions will be RE-SET under the new policy: (a) the Incontestability Clause; (b) the Waiting Period; and (c) the Suicide Clause. In addition, the following benefit will be LOST on the replaced insurance: (a) accumulated reversionary bonus at the point of claims.

keyPoints: 检视的四大触发因素:个人情况、外部发展、已购产品、产品发展 / Four triggers: personal circumstances, external developments, products purchased, product developments
退休/裁员的检视理想上应在事件发生'之前'进行,以便平稳过渡 / Retirement/redundancy review ideally done BEFORE the event
应询问客户希望多久检视一次,而非单方决定 / Ask clients how often they wish to review
外部触发=CPF 规则变动(如缴费率)与市场变化(如股价大跌) / External triggers = CPF rule changes and market changes
人寿:转换选择权通常无需健康证明;信托须查受益人;保额须跟上通胀 / Life: conversion options need no health evidence; review trust beneficiaries; sum assured vs inflation
健康险:按年续保是检视机会;失能收入保障须跟上收入/生活水准 / Health: annual renewal is a review point; DI cover must keep pace
投连产品依基金表现报告决定是否转换基金 / ILPs reviewed via fund performance report to decide switching
替换保单应被不鼓励、需主管同意;新单重置不可争议/等待期/自杀条款,丧失已累积复归红利 / Replacement discouraged, needs supervisor sign-off; resets incontestability/waiting/suicide, loses reversionary bonus
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.26 — Reviewing Clients' Portfolios (SCI, Version 1.1)
